description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a tailored suit jacket and matching trousers. He wears a collared shirt with a striped necktie, and his shoes are styled for business or formal occasions. The figure's arms are slightly extended outward, and his hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. His hair is neatly styled, parted to one side, and covers part of his forehead. The overall appearance is that of a professional individual, suitable for urban or office environments.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit with a tie, standing with arms slightly outstretched. The figure has neatly styled hair and wears formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit, tie, collared shirt, and facial features with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the relaxed hand posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the fit of the suit.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and necktie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
